## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss headcount planning, equity allocation, and compensation structures for managing directors and editors.](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Equity pool is nearly 90% allocated; need to carefully manage remaining equity for key hires](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Developing a bonus structure tied to revenue milestones to incentivize team performance](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Exploring compensation models for managing directors/editors to encourage growth and retention](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Headcount planning and forecasting tools need refinement to better align with company growth](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)

## Topics

### Equity Allocation and Forecasting

  - [Current equity pool is \~90% allocated out of 6.5% total](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Forecasting additional 4% allocation based on headcount model (up to 107 people)](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Engineering hires consuming significant equity; may need 30-40 basis points for key director-level hire](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Considering board approval to increase option pool if needed for critical AI hire](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Plan to implement 10:1 stock split to make share numbers more appealing in offers](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Bonus Structure Development

  - [Created pro-rated bonus model based on roles and time with company](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Considering 15% bonus for engineers due to high base compensation](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Aiming for \~$1M total bonus pool tied to revenue milestone (e.g., $20M ARR)](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Bonus structure designed to motivate team towards aggressive growth targets](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

### Managing Director/Editor Compensation

  - [Exploring model with 2% of revenue for managing directors, 2% for managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Aim to incentivize account retention, upselling, and team growth](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Challenges in fairly allocating accounts and measuring performance during rapid growth phase](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Considering alternatives like team-based goals or mixed models (base + commission on new/upsell)](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

### Headcount and Financial Planning Tools

  - [Using Airtable for visual headcount planning; considering integration with spreadsheet models](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Equity calculator needed to show weighted outcomes for recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Bonus forecast tied to headcount model to estimate total costs](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Desire to align all planning (headcount, equity, bonus) with sales forecast for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine managing director/editor compensation model for Q3 implementation](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Integrate headcount, equity, and bonus planning with sales forecasts](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Implement 10:1 stock split for more attractive equity offers](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Review and sign off on pending offer letters (including Jacob's)](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Collaborate with Jason (new hire) on improving rev ops automation and forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/SMpECezpJQ524DUia-24Neq7wfzUBPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
